Description: Identifies permanent (always-active) assignments to privileged directory roles. Best practice is to use Privileged Identity Management (PIM) for just-in-time role activation instead of standing assignments.
Risk: Permanent role assignments provide continuous privileged access without time-boxing or approval workflows. If an account with a permanent privileged role is compromised, the attacker has immediate access without needing to activate PIM.

Remediation.Recommendation: Convert permanent role assignments to PIM-eligible assignments that require just-in-time activation. At minimum, configure PIM for Global Administrator, Privileged Role Administrator, and Exchange Administrator roles.

SourceNotes: Framework control IDs were AI-generated. This check identifies ALL permanent assignments to high-privilege roles. PIM-eligible assignments use a different Graph endpoint (/roleManagement/directory/roleEligibilityScheduleInstances).
